nodes.name: Search Parameters
nodes.notes: Edit these to control what gets scraped. searchTerm = niche, locationQuery = city/area, maxResults = max places per search.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ searchStringsArray: [$json.searchTerm], locationQuery: $json.locationQuery, maxCrawledPlacesPerSearch: $json.maxResults, language: 'en', scrapePlaceDetailPage: true }) }}

nodes.name: Apify - Google Maps Email Extractor
nodes.notes: Runs the free Apify actor lukaskrivka/google-maps-with-contact-details synchronously and returns the scraped places (with emails) as items. run-sync has a 5 min server limit; keep maxResults modest.

nodes.name: Has Email?
nodes.notes: Keeps only places that have at least one email address.

nodes.name: Save to Google Sheets (optional)
nodes.notes: OPTIONAL destination. To use: enable this node, connect your Google account credential, pick a Spreadsheet + Sheet, then it will auto-map the lead columns. Leave disabled to just view leads on the Format node.
